DEFINITION: Scholarly work title returned for the input DOI.
LIMITATION: Titles may differ across metadata sources or versions.

DEFINITION: Normalized digital object identifier used as the corpus key.
LIMITATION: A DOI identifies a registered object, not necessarily a unique study.

DEFINITION: Publication year associated with the OpenAlex work record.
LIMITATION: Online-first and issue years can differ.

DEFINITION: OpenAlex open-access indicator for the work.
LIMITATION: Open-access status can change and depends on source coverage.

DEFINITION: Pipe-delimited funder names associated with the work.
LIMITATION: Funding acknowledgements are incompletely indexed.

DEFINITION: Display name retained for the consolidated author record.
ANALYTICAL_USE: Fallback identity construction and record interpretation.
LIMITATION: Names are not stable person identifiers and may include variants.

DEFINITION: Byline position category: first, middle, last, or unknown.
LIMITATION: Position conventions vary by field and do not fully encode contribution.

DEFINITION: Indicator that the authorship was marked as corresponding.
LIMITATION: Corresponding-author metadata can be incomplete and multiple authors may be marked.

DEFINITION: Display name of the first listed OpenAlex institution for the authorship.
LIMITATION: A single retained institution does not represent all concurrent affiliations.

DEFINITION: Country code from the first institution or authorship-country fallback.
LIMITATION: Represents publication-time affiliation evidence, not nationality or origin.

DEFINITION: OpenAlex author identifier or explicit source-fallback sentinel.
LIMITATION: OpenAlex author disambiguation can contain splits or merges.

DEFINITION: Cumulative works count at extraction time.
LIMITATION: Dynamic and dependent on OpenAlex coverage and author disambiguation.

DEFINITION: Cumulative cited-by count at extraction time.
LIMITATION: Dynamic, field dependent, and affected by database coverage.

DEFINITION: OpenAlex H-index at extraction time.
LIMITATION: Career-length, field, database, and identity-resolution dependent.

DEFINITION: Number of works with at least ten citations.
LIMITATION: Dynamic and database dependent.

DEFINITION: OpenAlex two-year mean citedness statistic.
LIMITATION: Sensitive to field, publication timing, and OpenAlex definitions.

DEFINITION: Pipe-delimited leading OpenAlex topics for the author.
LIMITATION: Automated topic assignment may be incomplete or imprecise.

DEFINITION: Primary OpenAlex topic assigned to the work.
LIMITATION: Automated topic assignment does not replace expert classification.

DEFINITION: Comma-delimited leading OpenAlex concepts retained by the pipeline.
LIMITATION: Concept labels are algorithmic and limited to retained leading values.

DEFINITION: PubMed identifier resolved from the DOI.
LIMITATION: Not all corpus papers are indexed in PubMed.

DEFINITION: First five retained Medical Subject Headings.
LIMITATION: MeSH is unavailable for unindexed or incompletely indexed records.

DEFINITION: Pipe-delimited funding agencies reported in PubMed.
LIMITATION: Funding metadata are incomplete and source dependent.

DEFINITION: PubMed author name matched through persistent identifiers.
LIMITATION: PubMed records often lack ORCID, reducing match coverage.

DEFINITION: Affiliation text from the matched PubMed author record.
LIMITATION: Affiliation assignment in PubMed can be incomplete.

DEFINITION: Semantic Scholar influential-citation count for the paper.
LIMITATION: Algorithmic and dependent on Semantic Scholar coverage.

DEFINITION: Reserved field for citation-context text.
ANALYTICAL_USE: No primary use in the completed analysis.
LIMITATION: The field was unpopulated in the completed run.

DEFINITION: Semantic Scholar author identifier matched through ORCID or Scopus ID.
LIMITATION: Identifier matching is limited by persistent-identifier availability.

DEFINITION: Semantic Scholar display name for the matched author.
LIMITATION: Name variants and missing persistent identifiers reduce match coverage.

DEFINITION: ORCID returned in Semantic Scholar external identifiers.
LIMITATION: Very low field coverage in the completed output.

DEFINITION: Semantic Scholar H-index for the matched author.
LIMITATION: Not directly comparable with OpenAlex because coverage and identities differ.

DEFINITION: Semantic Scholar cumulative citation count for the matched author.
LIMITATION: Not directly comparable with OpenAlex because coverage and identities differ.

DEFINITION: Consolidated ORCID retained for the author.
LIMITATION: Identifiers can be absent or unauthenticated in source metadata.

DEFINITION: Most recent visible ORCID employment organization and department.
MISSING_SENTINELS: No ORCID ID; No employment data listed in ORCID
LIMITATION: Records may be private, incomplete, outdated, or user-entered.

DEFINITION: Binary name-inferred label or Unknown/N/A sentinel.
LIMITATION: Not self-identified gender; binary inference is culturally variable and excludes nonbinary identities.

DEFINITION: LLM-inferred professional-domain category plus retained gender token.
LIMITATION: Automated inference was not independently expert validated.
